description: Plugin-distributed hooks for accounting-firm-cpa. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags CPA-firm anti-patterns (independence impairment, unsupported workpaper numbers, plaintext SSN/EIN, undated fee figures). Set ACCOUNTING_FIRM_CPA_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
